name: maestro
description: A downloadable, multi-agent AI maestro for any GitHub repo: PRD → aligned domain docs → vertical-slice issues → parallel subagents that each open a PR.

plugins.name: maestro
plugins.description: Autonomous, multi-agent AI maestro for any GitHub repo: plan a PRD, break it into native sub-issues, and fan out background workers that implement test-first and land each issue on an integration branch with one human review gate. Skills, hooks, scripts, subagents, and loops.
